text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wow, Flash, you made an Umatter account?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to your recommendation, yes.
You said it was vital to my life as a horsegirl,
and a service I owe to my fans, correct?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Our fans are always cheering us on,
so we should give them a little cheer through
our posts too☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what're you posting about anyway?
Let me see…

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
12:30 Beginning lunch. Status: On schedule.
14:40 Beginning independent training.
           Status: On schedule.
A-Ahhh, oookay…?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I've also discovered that Umatter posts are
an excellent way to maintain my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Although it does annoy me when the post's
timestamp is a few seconds off from the
moment I intended.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Y-Your Umatter looks like an itinerary…
